entities.name: Hydration Protocol
entities.context: Daily water intake target of half bodyweight in ounces

entities.name: Sleep Recovery Standard
entities.context: Minimum 7+ hours sleep as non-negotiable recovery requirement

entities.name: Pain vs. Discomfort Framework
entities.context: Decision framework distinguishing productive discomfort (burning/fatigue) from harmful pain (sharp/stabbing/joint) requiring immediate stop

entities.name: Safety Checklist
entities.context: Pre/during-activity checklist covering hydration, sleep, and pain awareness

relationships.context: Checklist includes hydration as a mandatory daily item
Checklist includes sleep as a non-negotiable recovery factor
Checklist includes pain assessment framework for safe training
V follows this safety checklist as part of a fitness or health protocol
